title: WebRTC: Building Real-Time Video Applications
author: Reese Morgan
Video Platform Engineer
description: Implement peer-to-peer video with WebRTC—but NAT traversal fails unpredictably
content:
WebRTC enables peer-to-peer audio/video communication in browsers.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Stream Collapse (2036)](/docs/articles/stream-collapse-2036)
